title: Sphaerostephanos beccarianus
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos beccarianus is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Sphaerostephanos, which belongs to the order Polypodiales. Sphaerostephanos beccarianus is a part of the class Polypodiopsida, a group of vascular plants that includes ferns and their allies. It is further classified as a member of the division Pteridophyta, which comprises all ferns and related plants. The classification of Sphaerostephanos beccarianus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the kingdom Plantae.
